name: Tom McClintock
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $278,611 for Tom McClintock in U.S. House, CA-05. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
